value.found_quote: Claude Code is an agent that reads your codebase, edits files, and runs commands across your terminal, IDE, desktop app, and browser. Build, debug, and ship with natural language.
value.rationale: The page is Anthropic's official Claude Code page, describing it as a generally available coding agent with pricing plans (Pro, Max), download options, and FAQ. This directly substantiates that Anthropic offers Claude Code as a current, active product.
